summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PGA Voice Bot - all backend APIs working correctly, frontend dashboard fully functional with proper UI components and navigation
passed_tests: GET /api/config/status shows Twilio and Anthropic both configured
Frontend dashboard loads with all 3 tabs working
Scenario selection dropdown populated with 12 scenarios
Bug report form validation prevents empty submissions
Stats display shows correct zero counts for fresh system
Tab navigation works between Dashboard/Transcripts/Bug Reports
All form elements have proper data-testids
Configuration status indicators show services ready
Scenario cards are clickable and update dropdown
